metadata.description: Claude Code skills by kalandengit. Add with: /plugin marketplace add kalandengit/python_learning_projects

plugins.name: planning-first
plugins.description: Forces a plan-first workflow: analyze requirements, propose an architecture, and get explicit approval before writing any code or files.

plugins.name: it-prompt-specialist
plugins.description: Senior multidisciplinary IT expert lens across software, cloud, security, AI/ML, networking, and more.

plugins.name: reverse-engineering
plugins.description: Senior reverse-engineering and binary-analysis expert: static/dynamic analysis, disassembly, malware triage, firmware, protocol reversing, and mobile RE. Lawful, authorized use only.

plugins.name: master-it-specialist-for-all-llm
plugins.description: Merges plan-first, it-prompt-specialist, and reverse-engineering into one master IT specialist. Ships a model-agnostic prompt (PROMPT.md/prompt.txt/Modelfile) for use in any LLM.
